delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Amt1,0) = 0 and coalesce(Amt2,0) = 0 and coalesce(Amt3,0) = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ProdCode = 'CHGBACK' and not Contract in ('1OSS000034','5OSS000001','5USA000087')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL, Crcy,CC, Contract, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, Contract, ProdCode, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, Contract, ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,Co,CC,ProdCode,Contract,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,Crcy,Co,CC,ProdCode,Contract,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-save' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ProdCode = 'CHGBACK'
update TransX set Co = '2008', PC = '', CC = '5USA000087', Contract = '1OSS000034', ProdCode = 'CHGBACK' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL, Crcy,PC,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, '4010' as Co, '6910000' as GL, Crcy, '' as PC, '1OSS000034' as CC, '5USA000087' as Contract, 'CHGBACK' as ProdCode, round(sum(-Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(-Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(-Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Crcy)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL, Crcy,PC,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, '4010' as Co, '6910501' as GL, Crcy, '' as PC, '5OSS000001' as CC, '5USA000087' as Contract, 'CHGBACK' as ProdCode, round(sum(-Amt1*.1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(-Amt2*.1),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(-Amt3*.1),2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' group by KeyID,Crcy)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL, Crcy,PC,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, '2008' as Co,'6911000' as GL, Crcy, '' as PC, '5USA000087' as CC, '5OSS000001' as Contract, 'CHGBACK' as ProdCode, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, 0 as Amt2, round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '6910501' and Co = '4010')
update x set x.GL = y.Descr from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on x.GL = y.ID and y.Table_ID = 'G87' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008'
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]', Amt1 = -Amt1, Amt2 = -Amt2, Amt3 = -Amt3 where KeyID = '[batchID]-save'

Update x set Rate1 = y.Rate from TransX x inner join (select Crcy,Rate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'M' and EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from (select EffDate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'M' and Crcy = 'MXN' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]') a)) y on x.Crcy = y.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008'
Update TransX set Amt2 = Amt3 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL, Crcy,PC, CC,Contract,ProdCode,TP,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, '2008' as Co, '1999901' as GL, Crcy, '1400000000' as PC, '' as CC,'' as Contract, '' as ProdCode, '4010' as TP,round(sum(-Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(-Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(-Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' group by KeyID,Crcy)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL, Crcy,PC, CC,Contract,ProdCode,TP,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, '4010' as Co, '1999901' as GL, Crcy, '5100000000' as PC, '' as CC,'' as Contract, '' as ProdCode, '2008' as TP, round(sum(-Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(-Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(-Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '4010' group by KeyID,Crcy)
Update TransX set TP = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP is NULL
Update TransX set PC = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,Contract,ProdCode,TP,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK,Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, ProdCode, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as PK, 'pass1' as Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,Contract,ProdCode,TP )
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex9 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 >0 or Amt2 > 0 or Amt3 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL, Crcy,PC, CC, Contract, ProdCode,TP,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co,GL, Crcy,PC,CC, Contract, ProdCode,TP,(case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1,(case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2,  (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and (Amt1 < 0 or Amt2 < 0 or Amt3 < 0))
update TransX set Amt1 = 0 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and Amt1 < 0
update TransX set Amt2 = 0 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and Amt2 < 0
update TransX set Amt3 = 0 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and Amt3 < 0
update TransX set GL = '2899901' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '50' and GL = '1999901'
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'Mexico Cat Modeler Chargeback for [Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
